summary: Ukrainian forces used an optical fiber FPV drone "Provod" to destroy a Polish 155-mm self-propelled howitzer "AHS Krab" in the Kharkiv region. A Russian soldier was hit by two Ukrainian FPV drones simultaneously while hiding behind a tree. Ukraine is deploying interceptor drones as a key element of short-range air defense against Russian "Geran" drones, with mobile fire groups and interceptor drones identified as the most promising counter-UAS tactics. Ukrainian forces repelled mechanized assaults on the Novopavlivka and Dobropillia directions, destroying enemy tanks with OZP Lasar’s Group and National Guard units. Rubikon Center operators conducted strikes on Ukrainian Armed Forces personnel in the Donbas and Krasny Liman direction, destroying 88 targets using FPV air defense against Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs on March 7, 2026.
